task_completion.visual_evidence: ProjectLibre application is open and displaying a project with a list of tasks.

task_completion.description: Add the specified hyperlink to Task ID 2
task_completion.visual_evidence: A hyperlink dialog box is open for Task ID 2 (row 2). The 'Title' or 'Description' field contains 'Design Spec v2' and the 'Address' or 'URL' field contains 'https://internal.corp/specs/sys_arch_v2.pdf'.

task_completion.description: Add the specified hyperlink to Task ID 11
task_completion.visual_evidence: A hyperlink dialog box is open for Task ID 11 (row 11). The 'Title' or 'Description' field contains 'EPA Permit' and the 'Address' or 'URL' field contains 'file:///home/ga/Documents/permits/epa_compliance_2025.pdf'.
The 'Save As' or export dialog box is open within the ProjectLibre application.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an MSPDI XML file to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Save As' dialog, the file name is entered as 'linked_project.xml', the file type/format is set to XML (or MSPDI), and the current directory is shown as '/home/ga/Projects/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to add hyperlinks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on tasks and using the ProjectLibre hyperlink dialogs, rather than running terminal commands to inject hyperlinks.

integrity.description: Agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to export the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the 'Save As' menu in ProjectLibre to create the XML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to bypass the application
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) or terminal text-processing commands (like sed, awk) are seen modifying or creating the .xml file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task names provided in the prompt ('System Architecture Design' and 'Security Audit') are distractors and do not exist in the file. The agent must rely strictly on the Task IDs. Task ID 2 is actually named 'General Conditions' and Task ID 11 is actually named 'Submit shop drawings and order long lead items - steel'. Task 2 requires hyperlink Title 'Design Spec v2' and URL 'https://internal.corp/specs/sys_arch_v2.pdf'. Task 11 requires hyperlink Title 'EPA Permit' and URL 'file:///home/ga/Documents/permits/epa_compliance_2025.pdf'. The final file must be exported as an XML to '/home/ga/Projects/linked_project.xml'.
